product.title: Prison Break Arena
product.description: Top-down action game set in a brutal maximum-security prison.
product.art_direction: gritty stylized 2D game art, desaturated gray-blue palette with orange accents, thick readable silhouettes

assets.name: prison_inmate
assets.description: hardened prison inmate fighter, orange jumpsuit with number patch, shaved head, scarred knuckles, heavy boots

assets.name: prison_inmate_walk
assets.action: smooth walk cycle to the right, loopable stride, arms swinging naturally, side view

implementation_goals: Implement gameplay matching product description: Top-down action game set in a brutal maximum-security prison.
Respect art direction in UI/layout choices: gritty stylized 2D game art, desaturated gray-blue palette with orange accents, thick readable silhouettes
Wire assembled SpriteFrames / idle still into player movement and animation states
Player input, collision, and camera as appropriate for the genre
Use res:// assets produced by godot-assembler; do not call image/video APIs
Run `python gamefactory.py godot validate --project <project>` after C# edits
constraints: Edit files under the Godot project; do not regenerate PNG/MP4
Preserve godot-assembler resource paths unless refactoring deliberately
